caption: A news broadcast focuses on political developments in Bihar, featuring a red and white graphical interface with a map of Bihar highlighted by a purple lightning bolt. The center of the screen displays the text "सुशासन पर चैलेंज" while the top banner asks, "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Various political figures appear in small inset circles; these include Nitish Kumar, labeled as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", as well as others labeled "मंत्री" such as Vijendra Yadav and Shravan Kumar. Another figure is identified as "डिप्टी CM" alongside names like Samrat Choudhary and Vijay Sinha. In the background of the center image, a man in a white kurta-pyjama stands before a building. A news ticker at the bottom states, "PM: ये टीम समर्पण भाव से बिहार की सेवा करेगी", accompanied by the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a timestamp of "10:04 PM". The frames show shifts in which specific leaders' portraits are highlighted on the screen.
